name: account-transaction
description: Tools for Portfolio.AccountTransaction on the ayunit MCP. Custody activity loaders — one skill per custodian (UBS Miami, Morgan Stanley, BTG Offshore/Cayman) that parse the export/API feed, apply field treatment, resolve assets/accounts/locks live, and insert validated trades + cash/GL movements — plus duplicate-trade-reconcile, which de-duplicates restated/double-loaded trades by reconciling against Portfolio.CustodyPosition and deleting the proven duplicates lock-aware.
